name: Ice Cream Cones Cat Toy - Boots & Barkley™ 2ct
description:
Serve up sweet fun for your feline friend with the 2-Count Ice Cream Cones Food-Shaped Cat Toys from Boots & Barkley™. This set includes two whimsical ice cream cone plush toys with yellow waffle cones adorned with colorful sprinkles on top and shimmery white trailing tails for an eye-catching look. Each toy features an embroidered smiley face with black eyes, a mouth and tiny pink hearts as cheeks to delight your cat, and they're great for chewing, chasing and pouncing.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
